keyboardHelper.title: Having trouble connecting?
keyboardHelper.description: The configurator requires the drum to be in Keyboard mode. Follow these steps:

ps4AuthGenerator.title: PS4 Auth Generator (Debug)
ps4AuthGenerator.description: Upload key.pem, serial.txt, and sig.bin to generate canonical auth bytes for comparison with generateAuthConfig.py, then upload them directly to the board.

errors.selectFiles: Please select key.pem, serial.txt, and sig.bin.
errors.generateFailed: Failed to generate PS4 auth data.
errors.connectToCheck: Connect a device to check PS4 auth status.
errors.queryFailed: Failed to query PS4 auth status.
errors.uploadFailed: Upload failed. Check serial connection and try again.
errors.connectBeforeClear: Connect a device before clearing PS4 auth.
errors.clearFailed: Clear failed. Check serial connection and try again.

status.authPresent: Device status: PS4 auth is present.
status.authAbsent: Device status: no PS4 auth stored.
status.uploadedRebooting: PS4 auth uploaded. Device is rebooting — reconnect when it comes back.
status.clearedRebooting: PS4 auth cleared. Device is rebooting — reconnect when it comes back.

output.generatedSummary: Generated: serial {{serialBytes}} bytes, signature {{signatureBytes}} bytes, key.pem {{keyPemChars}} chars.

status.connectToCheck: Connect a device to check status.
status.authInstalled: PS4 auth key is installed. PS4 mode is fully supported.
status.noAuthKey: No PS4 auth key. PS4 mode will disconnect after 8 minutes.

setupModal.title: Set Up PS4 Authentication
setupModal.descriptionSelect: Upload your DS4 credentials to enable full PS4 compatibility.
setupModal.descriptionConfirm: Review and upload to your controller.
setupModal.descriptionUploading: Please wait while credentials are transferred.
setupModal.filesIntro: You'll need three files extracted from a PS4 DualShock 4 controller:

validated.heading: Files validated successfully
validated.summary: Serial: {{serialBytes}} bytes · Signature: {{signatureBytes}} bytes · Key: {{keyPemChars}} chars

whatWillHappen.heading: What will happen:
whatWillHappen.step1: The credentials are uploaded to the controller.
whatWillHappen.step3: Reconnect and switch to PS4 mode.

rebooting.heading: Credentials uploaded!
rebooting.body: The controller is rebooting. Reconnect once it comes back online, then switch to PS4 mode.

errors.readFailed: Failed to read files. Check their format and try again.
errors.uploadFailed: Upload failed. Check your connection and try again.

clearModal.title: Remove PS4 Auth Key
clearModal.descriptionPending: This will delete the stored PS4 credentials from the controller and reboot it.
clearModal.keyRemoved: Key removed. Reconnect when the controller comes back online.

errors.clearFailed: Clear failed. Check your connection and try again.
